dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4955 IS: Gateway Arch National Park Boundary Revision Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Durbin introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources

form.official-title: To amend the Act of May 17, 1954, to revise the boundary of Gateway Arch National Park.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Gateway Arch National Park Boundary Revision Act of 2026.

section.header: Gateway Arch National Park boundary revision
section.text: Section 4(a) of the Act of May 17, 1954 (68 Stat. 99, chapter 204; 16 U.S.C. 450jj–3(a)), is amended, in the first sentence—

paragraph.text: by striking the Jefferson National Expansion Memorial and inserting Gateway Arch National Park;
by striking one hundred acres and inserting 102.18 acres; and
by striking map entitled and all that follows through January 1992 and inserting map entitled Gateway Arch National Park Proposed Boundary Revision, numbered 366/189,627, and dated August 2023.
